name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-13
title: Commit CLAUDE.md to git and validate against policy files on every stop
description: CLAUDE.md is currently gitignored (.gitignore line 4) and generated at install/setup time but not tracked. Goal: (1) remove CLAUDE.md from .gitignore, (2) commit CLAUDE.md as a versioned artifact like skills, (3) add a stop hook that diffs the committed CLAUDE.md against a fresh generation from policy files and warns on discrepancy. Working mechanism (branch, tdd-step.sh, dispatch) unchanged.
